blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
